response:
Certainly! Here's a letter written in all capital letters:

---

HELLO [RECIPIENT'S NAME],

I HOPE THIS LETTER FINDS YOU WELL. I AM WRITING TO SHARE SOME NEWS AND THOUGHTS WITH YOU.

FIRSTLY, I WANTED TO LET YOU KNOW THAT I HAVE BEEN BUSY WITH SEVERAL PROJECTS LATELY. WORK HAS BEEN QUITE DEMANDING, BUT IT HAS ALSO BEEN EXTREMELY REWARDING. I HAVE LEARNED A LOT AND HAVE BEEN ABLE TO APPLY SOME NEW SKILLS THAT I AM PROUD OF.

IN ADDITION TO WORK, I HAVE ALSO BEEN SPENDING TIME ON SOME PERSONAL PROJECTS THAT I AM EXCITED ABOUT. I HAVE STARTED READING MORE, AND I HAVE JOINED A LOCAL BOOK CLUB. IT HAS BEEN GREAT TO CONNECT WITH LIKE-MINDED PEOPLE AND DISCUSS DIFFERENT PERSPECTIVES ON VARIOUS TOPICS.

I ALSO WANTED TO THANK YOU FOR YOUR CONTINUOUS SUPPORT AND ENCOURAGEMENT. YOUR POSITIVE WORDS AND ADVICE HAVE MEANT A LOT TO ME, AND I APPRECIATE HAVING YOU IN MY LIFE.

PLEASE LET ME KNOW HOW YOU ARE DOING AND IF THERE IS ANYTHING EXCITING HAPPENING ON YOUR END. I WOULD LOVE TO HEAR MORE ABOUT YOUR RECENT ADVENTURES AND ACCOMPLISHMENTS.

TAKE CARE AND STAY SAFE.

BEST WISHES,
[YOUR NAME]

---

IF YOU HAVE ANY SPECIFIC DETAILS OR PERSONAL TOUCHES YOU'D LIKE TO ADD, FEEL FREE TO INCLUDE THEM!
